name: Kohm
description: For every shot fired in rapid succession the Kohm releases an additional bolt and grows more lethal.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: For every shot fired in rapid succession the Kohm releases an additional bolt and grows more lethal.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Kohm
Kuva Kohm
Kohmak
Twin Kohmak

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tusk Heavy Gunners aiming into the ground sometimes with their grattler and not swapping back to it from their Kohmak when you put some distance between you.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error related to the Kohm.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kohm and Kuva Kohm's Energy ring in the middle of the weapon not using the chosen Energy color.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.10
patchlogs.changes: Increased the accuracy of the Kohmak/Twin Kohmak.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Kohm’s firing charge sound staying active.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.17.3
patchlogs.changes: Improved performance issues when firing the Furis or Kohm.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.12.0
patchlogs.additions: Added new sound to the Kohm reload.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kohm having incorrect reload clip ejection timing.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Kohm magazine capacity dropping from 960 to 120 when the Twin Rogga is equipped prior as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/768045-kohm-and-twin-rogga-bullet/
Fixed minor clipping on the weapon model seen when reloading the Kohm.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script errors with the Kohm and the Dendra Armor.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: 19.1.0 Ash Revisited
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kohm appearing to fire inhumanly fast when viewed as the Host.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Fatal Acceleration Mod being usable on Kohm since it was changed to Hitscan a while ago, the Mod had no affect.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.changes: •    Improved the firing/recoil animation of the Twin Kohmaks.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.5
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed minor reloading animation issues on the Kohmak.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.10.0: Operation Rathuum!
patchlogs.fixes:
Doubling their volley on each successive shot, the Twin Kohmaks decimate foes in seconds. Find them in the Market today, or on Kela de Thaym!
·         Fixed the Kohmak muzzle flash always being default white.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed timing issues with the Kohmak reload animations.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Made small adjustments to Kohm audio and visual effects.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.fixes:
Kohmak 
Like the larger Kohm, this hand-shotgun doubles its volley with every successive shot.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced particle effect trails for Kohm’s projectiles.
Adjusted the Kohm to shoot a maximum of 5 pellets, in addition to dropping the fire rate but boosting projectile damage to compensate for dps.  This should keep the Kohm’s damage relatively unchanged, while helping cut down on the graphical latency caused by the weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced fire rate of Kohm in full auto, but boosted projectile damage to compensate.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Kohm creating particle effects on Mirage’s clones when particle settings are not set to High in system settings.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Added spin down effect to Kohm.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.0 Nova Prime
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the Kohm’s weapon damage from 15 to 25.
Decreased the Kohm’s Ammo Consumption.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Kohm:  The Kohm is a primary plasma shotgun with a unique held-trigger function.  For every shot fired in rapid succession the Kohm releases an additional bolt, growing more lethal with every pull of the trigger!
